final:
module top_module(
	input clk,
	input reset_n,
	input up,
	output reg [7:0] q);always @(posedge clk) begin
	if (!reset_n)
		q <= 8'b00000000;
	else if (up)
		q <= q + 1;
	else
		q <= q - 1;
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      q <= q; // This statement does not change the value of q
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: q <= q; // This statement does not change the value of q
